Subject: Request for Canadian Support for Iran’s Democratic Transition
Body:
Dear {{RepresentativeFullName}},

I am writing as a concerned constituent in {{RidingOrRegion}} (Postal Code: {{PostalCode}}) regarding the historic developments currently unfolding in Iran and the urgent need for principled, not merely symbolic, support from Canada.

Iran is at a decisive moment in its modern history. The Iranian people have moved far beyond isolated protests and are now engaged in a nationwide struggle to reclaim their country from a regime that has lost all legitimacy through decades of terror, repression, corruption, and violence. Iranian citizens are demanding a future grounded in democracy, human rights, and the rule of law.

As a Conservative representative, your leadership on national security, accountability, and principled foreign policy is especially important at this moment. Iranian-Canadians are asking Parliament to respond with clear resolve against a regime that has repeatedly used violence, intimidation, and transnational repression.

At this critical time, Canada has the opportunity to stand clearly with the people of Iran and support a peaceful transition toward a stable, democratic, and unified Iran. In this regard, several fundamental principles are essential.

1. Standing with the Iranian people in their struggle for freedom
As a member of the Iranian-Canadian community, I strongly urge that Canada and its elected representatives stand firmly with the people of Iran in their struggle for freedom and human dignity, and maintain that support until the Iranian people are able to replace the current regime with a democratic government of their own choosing.

2. Recognition of Prince Reza Pahlavi as the leading voice for democratic transition
The Iranian people have repeatedly and clearly demonstrated their desire for democratic change. Millions of Iranians have taken to the streets despite severe repression and state violence, and the name of Prince Reza Pahlavi has been widely voiced as a symbol of national unity and leadership for democratic transition. This aspiration was also clearly reflected in the large global gathering of Iranians worldwide on February 14, where Iranians around the world expressed their support for Prince Reza Pahlavi as the central figure for a secular and democratic transition in Iran. On this basis, Iranian-Canadians expect Canada to engage with Prince Reza Pahlavi and, where possible, extend an invitation for him to address the House of Commons.

3. Protection of Iran’s territorial integrity and national unity
It is deeply important to Iranians that the territorial integrity and national unity of Iran remain fully respected and protected. Iran must remain a single, sovereign nation, and any attempt to fragment or divide the country would be unacceptable to the Iranian people.

4. Respect for the sovereign will of the Iranian people
The future political system of Iran must ultimately be determined by the free will of the Iranian people through a transparent and democratic process, such as a national referendum, ensuring that the final outcome reflects the will of the majority.

5. Accountability for regime crimes and protection of civilians
Canada should continue to pursue firm measures against individuals and entities responsible for human rights abuses, including identifying and seizing assets connected to officials involved in repression. At the same time, in any period of conflict or political transition, the protection of civilians must remain a fundamental priority, and every effort must be made to prevent harm to non-combatants.

Canada has long been recognized as a defender of democracy, human rights, and the rule of law. By supporting a peaceful democratic transition in Iran, while emphasizing national unity, civilian protection, and respect for the sovereign will of the Iranian people, Canada can play an important role in helping ensure a stable and democratic future for Iran.

Thank you for your time and for your service to our community. I appreciate your attention to this important issue and hope you will continue to show leadership on this matter.

Sincerely,
{{UserName}}
{{PhoneNumber}}
